description: Continuous-method timing diagram: TIME axis with a glowing CURRENT ON window (half-wave pulse train draws across it). DRY lane: small part under AC yoke poles inside the window — powder dust cloud, indication holds at the crack, gentle air sweep lifts excess, all under power. WET lane: flood hose applies bath BEFORE the window, hose diverts at the window edge, two ~0.5s shots fire inside the window while the bath drains and the indication forms.
